dealSummary: Mercury, a banking-focused fintech specialist, raised a $200 million Series D led by TCV at a $5.2 billion valuation.
Primer, a London-based payments infrastructure startup, raised a $100 million Series C led by Sofina.
Variational, the developer of a decentralized protocol for crypto trading, secured a $50 million Series A led by Dragonfly Capital.
Catena Labs, which offers tools for AI agents to conduct financial transactions, raised a $30 million Series A led by Acrew Capital and Andreessen Horowitz's a16z crypto.
leadInvestors: Acrew Capital, Andreessen Horowitz's a16z crypto

dealSummary: CircuitHub, a UK-based hardware production startup, secured $28 million in a round led by Plural.
RemotePass, which offers an employment and payroll platform, raised a $17.4 million Series B led by EBRD Venture Capital.
